announcement_channel.name: Nimbus Systems Maintenance Feed
announcement_channel.archive_url_note: Announcements are published to the public maintenance feed and retained for 24 months.

access.reason: The maintenance archive for this period is served from an authentication-gated endpoint. Public retrieval returns no announcement records.

notes: No maintenance announcement data is available to the public for this service period. This record documents that the source is inaccessible. It must not be read as a record that no maintenance occurred.
